name: auth-api
description: Production-ready REST API authentication system with SQLite

scripts.test: DATABASE_URL=file:./data/test.db prisma db push --skip-generate && node --test --test-concurrency=1 src/tests/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:watch: DATABASE_URL=file:./data/test.db prisma db push --skip-generate && node --test --test-concurrency=1 --watch src/tests/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: DATABASE_URL=file:./data/test.db prisma db push --skip-generate && node --experimental-test-coverage --test --test-concurrency=1 src/tests/**/*.test.js
